query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.direcao, a.tipoArquivo, a.convenioId, c.nome as convenioNome, a.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimentoNome, a.createdAt 
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE a.direcao = 'retornado' AND (c.nome LIKE '%nimed%' OR c.nome LIKE '%NIMED%')
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:

FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
